# ResearchControlStudy TradingReview Fixture

This Store snapshot is deterministic protocol input generated by the real LocalStore flow in
`comparison-confirmation-campaign.integration.test.ts`. That flow runs comparison coordination,
precommitted confirmation windows, qualification, verdict, research release, TradingPromotion,
and restart replay before the snapshot is copied.

Ordinary LocalStore readback validates the snapshot's comparison confirmation, verdict,
qualification, candidate, admission, paper evaluation, and paper-only TradingPromotion graph. It
is not market evidence, a profitability result, a causal research result, or live authority.
